overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from a dark fantasy horror game. A character in Victorian-era clothing walks along a foggy cobblestone path toward a gothic manor at night, with atmospheric blue lighting and dense fog limiting visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy cobblestone path alongside marshy grassland

agents.ego_description: character in long dark coat and tricorn hat walking steadily along the cobblestone path away from the camera

entered.detail: Victorian-style street lamp with warm orange glow on the left side of the path
wet cobblestone pathway winding through the fog
tall dead grass and marsh vegetation lining the right side of the path
large stone building with dark silhouette barely visible through the fog ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy cobblestone path at night, passing a lit gas lamp on the left. The path stretches ahead through overgrown marshland toward distant gothic buildings barely visible through the dense mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding path with stone wall approach

events.description: passes the gas lamp post which moves behind the character

agents.ego_description: character continuing along the curving path as the environment shifts from open marsh to walled approach

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Moving past the lamp post, the path curves gently through the fog with a stone wall emerging on the left. The gothic manor ahead becomes more defined as the character approaches, while the marsh grass continues on the right.

events.description: warm orange light from building windows becomes visible ahead through the fog

agents.ego_description: character walking toward the illuminated manor entrance with increasing proximity to the stone structures

entered.detail: warm orange light glowing from multiple windows in the stone manor building
small stone structure resembling a well or wayside shrine in the center of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the manor entrance where warm light glows from windows, cutting through the blue fog. The stone wall runs close on the left as the path leads toward a shrine-like structure before the building, creating a sense of impending arrival at the destination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate path that transitions from a shrouded marshland into the imposing presence of a gothic manor. It begins with the character walking past a lit gas lamp on a foggy cobblestone road, where distant buildings are barely visible through the dense mist. As the camera moves forward, the path curves gently and a stone wall emerges on the left, while the silhouette of the manor becomes increasingly defined against the overgrown marsh grass. The scene then shifts as the character approaches the entrance, where warm light begins to glow from the windows and cut through the atmospheric blue fog. Finally, the path leads closely along the stone wall toward a shrine-like structure, signaling the arrival at the destination.
